title: aristolochia rotunda subsp. rotunda
intro: Aristolochia rotunda subsp. rotunda, also known as Round Birthwort, is a perennial plant species in the Aristolochiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Aristolochia rotunda subsp. rotunda include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit potential antitumor and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
